scope.purpose: Register source identity, family, system alignment, usability, and risks before placement evidence extraction.

tiers.A1: direct explicit table, rule, formula, or placement passage with page reference
tiers.D: astrological, numerological, or other auxiliary mapping

evidencePolicy.dedupeRule: Records from the same source family do not count as independent votes by default.

risks: project-derived compilation; must not be cited as independent historical evidence
binary notation uses 0/1 convention distinct from runtime 1/2 dots
